title: The Future of Indian Analytics
body: This is the full text of my first original report. As a communications specialist, I can write complete, in-depth articles here. There is no limit to how long this text can be. The automated engine will read this file, format it beautifully, and pin it to the very top of the live website under an "ORIGINAL REPORT" banner.

title: System Alert: AI Engine Timeout
summary: The Gemini AI failed to process the request after 4 attempts. Error: 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT. {'error': {'code': 400, 'message': 'API key expired. Please renew the API key.', 'status': 'INVALID_ARGUMENT', 'details': [{'@type': 'type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.ErrorInfo', 'reason': 'API_KEY_INVALID', 'domain': 'googleapis.com', 'metadata': {'service': 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com'}}, {'@type': 'type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.LocalizedMessage', 'locale': 'en-US', 'message': 'API key expired. Please renew the API key.'}]}}
analysis: This usually means the free tier API is currently overloaded.
